items.description: Detectives from the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) apprehended three suspected armed robbers in Githurai, Kiambu County, during an intelligence-led operation, police stated.

items.title: NGEC Cautions Kenyans Against Sharing Revenge Porn and Survivor Identity
items.description: Chairperson of the National Gender and Equality Commission (NGEC) Rehema Dida Jaldesa The National Gender and Equality Commission (NGEC) has issued a stern warning to media outlets, social media users, and content creators against sharing identifying details or sensitive content involving survivors of sexual and gender.
items.author: Rania Martin

items.title: Skai Jackson Issues Apology After Backlash Over Kenya Mirror Remarks
items.description: American actress Skai Jackson has apologized for remarks she made about Kenya, stating her comments reflected what she experienced during a visit to a small village and were never intended to describe the country as a whole.

items.title: Maluma’s ‘Loco X Volver’ Spins Off a Second Tropical Airplay No. 1
items.description: Maluma adds another Billboard Tropical Airplay chart champ to his résumé as “Tu Recuerdo” ascends 2-1 on the chart dated July 25, marking his fifth career leader and the second No. 1 from the album Loco X Volver.
items.author: Lucy Ogunde

items.title: Kierra Sheard Receives BMI Impact Award at 2026 BMI Trailblazers of Gospel Music Awards
items.description: BMI marked the best in gospel music on Tuesday (July 21) at the 2026 BMI Trailblazers of Gospel Music Awards held at BMI’s Nashville office, where Kierra Sheard received the BMI Impact Award in recognition of her career and impact on the future of gospel music.

items.title: How Prosecutors Plan to Prove Albert Ojwang’ Was Killed in Custody
items.description: The prosecution has informed the High Court that it will prove former Central Police Station OCS Samson Talaam and five co-accused fatally assaulted Albert Omondi Ojwang in custody before orchestrating a cover-up.

items.title: Old Mutual takes financial wellness drive to Mombasa to bolster economic resilience
